title: conyza pallida
intro: Conyza pallida, also known as straggly corkscrew or fleabane, is a perennial plant native to Australia and New Zealand, belonging to the daisy family (Asteraceae). Traditionally, the plant has been used for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, which have been utilized to treat various health issues. The health benefits of Conyza pallida include its potential to soothe skin irritations, reduce fever, and alleviate digestive problems. Conyza pallida can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, or tinctures, which are often used to harness its medicinal properties and promote overall well-being.
